title: Tiny Dragons
description: Adopt, tame and explore with your own Tiny Dragons!
body:
Hatch, tame and explore with Tiny Dragons! Find rare eggs, hatch your dragons with warmth and discover faithful allies who not only protect you but make your journey even more incredible. Download now and have a companion who is pure fire!

![title](https://i.imgur.com/vrSyUpt.png)

![dragons](https://i.imgur.com/0RQIb0G.gif)

1. Find the Dragon Egg:
Search inside chests in structures such as temples, fortresses, bastions, dungeons, etc.

2. Hatch the egg:
- Place the egg in bonfires, magma blocks, lava cauldrons or directly into lava. The egg needs intense heat and takes about 10 minutes to hatch.
- You will know it is working if the egg starts to shake and emit smoke.

![egg](https://i.imgur.com/e7sd78K.gif)

Dragon eggs are ancient relics, petrified by time. Its true origin is a mystery, as no one knows what species it belongs to. When you hatch them, a unique dragon of random breed will be born. Good luck in obtaining a magnificent and rare specimen!

3. Tame the Dragon:
- Once hatched, the dragon will be wild. It will not attack, but may try to run away if it is outdoors.
- To tame it, offer raw rabbit meat or raw chicken meat.

4. Dragon Skills:
- When tamed, it can give you the Fire Resistance effect when fed raw rabbit or chicken meat.
- The dragon can be set to follow you or roam freely by right-clicking on it.
- In combat, dragons defend their owners with blasts of fire, making them powerful allies!
(poison, ice and lightning attacks planned in the future)
